---
name: "📖 Documentation Request"
about: "Propose improvements or corrections to README, SECURITY, or development guides."
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## 📖 Documentation Correction Area
Identify which Markdown file or guide contains the discrepancy or needs expansion (e.g., `README.md`, `SECURITY.md`, deployment config lists).

## 📝 Proposed Text Changes
Provide the recommended wording, correction, or visual diagram additions you'd like to integrate.

## 🧠 Strategic Value
Why is this update critical? (e.g., outdated Firestore credential instructions, typo in Conventional Commit standards, clarified API rate limits).
